description: Twine Health, branded here through Fitbit Plus materials, provides a healthcare/patient engagement platform for organizations to manage patients, coaches, plans, metrics, and related health data. Its published developer-facing integration surface is the Fitbit Plus API.
summary: twinehealth.com exposes one documented REST API surface: the Fitbit Plus API at `https://api.twinehealth.com/pub`, described by a public OpenAPI spec and authenticated with OAuth 2.0 client credentials.
